narrative.narrative: Extreme fear is gripping the market as the Fear & Greed Index plunges to 25, yet stablecoin reserves are quietly expanding—a classic divergence that historically precedes accumulation. This setup closely mirrors the August 2024 bottom, where a similar cocktail of panic and sidelined capital preceded a sharp relief rally. The regime remains risk-off, but the powder is quietly being stacked.
narrative.headline: Panic Meets Powder: Echoes of August

consensus.key_reasoning: The Fear & Greed Index at 25 places the market in the Panic phase, and while the 79.3% similarity to the August 2024 bottom suggests accumulation is near, the current risk-off regime requires patience for confirmation. Both brains align on a divergence between extreme fear and growing stablecoin reserves, warranting caution rather than aggressive positioning.
disagreements_noted: Pattern Analyst calls Anxiety (score 39-46) while Narrative Writer frames the setup as Panic (score 24-31) based on the Fear & Greed Index at 25
Pattern Analyst emphasizes diverging technical factors (ETF flows, MVRV z-score, funding) while Narrative Writer focuses on the historical bottom analog
